tier.label: Standard class
tier.standard: Solid internal training with enough evidence for reliable instruction.

score.summary: Knowledge-base score 88/100 (excellent): coverage 100, authority 78, recency 75. 16/8 sources, 7/2 primary.

messages: Knowledge base meets the selected Standard class floor.

modules.title: Orientation and learner baseline
modules.goal: Set the purpose, audience floor, assumptions, and mastery target.
modules.deep_dive_expectation: substantive deep dives where required by tier and setting

modules.title: Knowledge base and source boundary
modules.goal: Show what the approved sources support, what is missing, and what must not be invented.

modules.title: Core concepts and vocabulary
modules.goal: Teach the essential terms, mental models, and decision points.

modules.title: Guided practice and examples
modules.goal: Work through realistic cases, common mistakes, checks, and facilitator prompts.
modules.deep_dive_expectation: substantive deep dives where required by tier and setting

modules.title: Deep dives, edge cases, and quality risks
modules.goal: Add expert detail, safety cautions, disagreements, and advanced transfer examples.
modules.deep_dive_expectation: substantive deep dives where required by tier and setting

modules.title: Assessment, transfer, and works cited
modules.goal: Prove mastery, capture participation, and close with source transparency.
